title: The most insane week in AI
summary: A video news digest covering major AI releases in a single week including DeepSeek V4, Kimi K2.6, MiMo v2.5, GPT 5.5, and multiple research projects. The title frames these announcements as "insane" or exceptional in volume and impact, suggesting rapid advancement across multiple AI domains including language models, vision systems, and robotics.
